field_mappings._note: Legacy column name -> modern column name. Apply after .upper().strip() on all column names.

identical_fields._note: Fields that have the same name in legacy and modern. Listed for completeness.

dropped_fields._note: Legacy fields with no modern equivalent. Safe to discard during normalization.

COUNT.description: Number of trade transactions aggregated into the row

DISTGROUP.impact: None - derivable from DEPE port codes

NTAR.description: National Transportation Analysis Region (import tariff/customs area)
NTAR.impact: Low - not used in standard analysis

modern_table_schemas._note: The 3 modern (2007+) table column definitions. Target schema for normalization.

DOT3.description: Port x Commodity (no legacy equivalent, 2007+ only)

legacy_table_definitions._note: Maps legacy table numbers to their dimensions and modern equivalents.

filename_suffix_rules._note: Legacy filenames encode country + trade direction in suffix letters. These must be derived into columns during normalization.

date_mappings._note: STATMOYR changed format mid-stream. Modern files use separate MONTH and YEAR columns.

legacy_table_evolution._note: Which table types exist in which time periods. Critical for knowing what files to expect per year.

1993_apr_dec.description: Original format. No A/B suffix split for surface tables.
1993_apr_dec.notes: 1993 uses SCH_B_GRP and TSUSA_GRP instead of SCH_B/TSUSA. Also has MEXREGION, USREGION, DISTGROUP columns.

1994_transition.description: Jan-Mar: old format. Apr-Dec: A/B split for surface tables.
1994_transition.notes: A = export, B = import for surface tables. Air/vessel tables keep single suffix.

1995_to_2002.notes: 1995 has 26 revision files (X-prefix and R-prefix) for Jan-Mar and Jul. Use revisions instead of originals.

2003_to_2006.description: B-variants dropped. A-tables now contain both exports AND imports.
2003_to_2006.notes: Since A-tables now have both directions, TRDTYPE must be derived from COUNTRY field or data content, not filename suffix alone.

2007_onward.notes: All countries, directions, and modes in single files. TRDTYPE and COUNTRY are explicit columns.

case_sensitivity.description: 2006 DBF files use lowercase column names (e.g., 'disagmot', 'depe'). All other years use uppercase.
case_sensitivity.fix: Apply .upper().strip() to all column names before mapping.

trailing_spaces.description: 2006 DBF files have trailing spaces in column names (e.g., 'disagmot  ').
trailing_spaces.fix: Apply .strip() to all column names before mapping.

revision_files_1995.description: 26 revision files with X-prefix and R-prefix exist for Jan-Mar 1995 and Jul 1995.
revision_files_1995.fix: Use revision files INSTEAD OF original files for those months.

may_1993_date_mismatch.description: 4 files in May 1993 (D04MAY93, D06MAY93, D10MAY93, D12MAY93) contain STATMOYR=0493 (April), not 0593.
may_1993_date_mismatch.fix: These are likely re-released April data with May filenames. Trust STATMOYR value over filename.

commodity_code_1993.description: 1993 uses SCH_B_GRP and TSUSA_GRP which may be grouped/aggregated commodity codes rather than individual HS 2-digit codes.
commodity_code_1993.fix: Verify that values match the same coding scheme used from 1994+. Flag if discrepancies found.

b_tables_dropped_2003.description: When B-variants were dropped in 2003, A-variant tables began containing both exports AND imports.
b_tables_dropped_2003.fix: For 2003-2006 surface tables, do NOT derive TRDTYPE from suffix. Check COUNTRY field or data content.

MEXSTATE_BN.description: Baja California Norte code BN used erroneously Apr 1994 - May 1998

fields_missing_in_legacy._note: Modern columns that have no legacy equivalent. These will be null/empty for pre-2007 records.

CONTCODE_surface.description: Containerization code not available in legacy surface tables (D03-D06)

SHIPWT_surface.description: Shipping weight not available in legacy surface tables (D03-D06)

FREIGHT_CHARGES_mexico_surface.description: Freight charges not in legacy Mexico surface tables (D03, D05). Available in Canada surface (D04, D06) as FREIGHT.

DOT3_pre_2007.description: Port x Commodity cross-tabulation did not exist before January 2007. Cannot reconstruct from legacy data.
